sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_string String, tz String, parsed_date DateTime);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date < toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59') AND parsed_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT d1.id, d1.parsed_date, d2.parsed_date AS comparison_date FROM (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates) AS d1 JOIN (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL) AS d2 ON d1.parsed_date < d2.parsed_date;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE date_string != '' GROUP BY parsed_date HAVING parsed_date < now()) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num_string String, num_value Int32);

SELECT num_string, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_format(num_value, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS formatted_date FROM test_numbers WHERE parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_format(num_value, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') < now();

SELECT t1.id, t1.parsed_date FROM (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates) AS t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(date_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', tz) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NULL) AS t2 ON t1.parsed_date < t2.parsed_date;
SELECT AVG(num_value) AS average_value FROM test_numbers GROUP BY parseDateTimeInJodaSyntax(num_string, 'yyyy-MM-dd') HAVING AVG(num_value) < 150;
